name: ModelDB 189347 DSGC (exact reproduction)
short_description: From-scratch port of ModelDB accession 189347 (Poleg-Polsky and Diamond 2016) reproducing every paper figure on its own metrics: PSP amplitudes, slope angles, ROC AUC, Figure 8 spikes; pinned to commit 87d669dcef18e9966e29c88520ede78bc16d36ff.

entry_points.name: build_dsgc
entry_points.description: Build the ModelDB 189347 DSGC cell (350 dend sections, 282 ON synapses) under NEURON 8.2.7.

entry_points.name: run_one_trial
entry_points.description: Run a single drifting-bar trial via h.simplerun() with explicit exptype, direction, b2gnmda, and noise overrides; returns peak PSP, baseline mean, and spike times.

entry_points.name: ensure_neuron_importable
entry_points.description: NEURON-on-Windows bootstrap: sets NEURONHOME, registers DLL dirs, inserts the bindings on sys.path.

entry_points.name: main
entry_points.description: Runs every Poleg-Polsky 2016 figure reproduction sweep (Fig 1-8) and writes per-figure CSVs under results/data/.

entry_points.name: main
entry_points.description: Aggregates the per-figure CSVs into the explicit multi-variant results/metrics.json.

entry_points.name: main
entry_points.description: Renders results/images/fig{1..8}_*.png from the per-figure CSVs with paper-vs-reproduction overlays.
